benchmarkedModels.pricingNotes: OpenRouter reference blend for openai/gpt-5.4 is 5.625 USD per 1M tokens using a 3:1 input:output mix.
Primary blended price derived automatically from OpenRouter listing openai/gpt-5.4-mini using a 3:1 input:output blend.
benchmarkedModels.stabilityNotes: Observed to complete ORPT-Bench scripting smoke runs cleanly and is the current preferred headless dev baseline.

charts.title: Composite score
charts.description: Correctness-first overall ranking across the full benchmark set.

charts.title: Success rate
charts.description: How often each model actually closes tasks, independent of efficiency.

charts.title: ORPT
charts.description: Lower is better: fewer requests per successful task.

charts.title: Total benchmark cost
charts.description: Total spend per model across the published full run.

charts.title: Composite vs benchmark cost
charts.description: Quality against the actual cost of clearing the published benchmark suite.

charts.title: Composite vs catalog price
charts.description: Observed ORPT-Bench quality against catalog blended price per 1M tokens.

charts.title: Total wall time
charts.description: Lower is better: total elapsed model runtime across benchmark tasks.

charts.title: Total requests
charts.description: Total request units consumed across the published run.

charts.title: Spend split by outcome
charts.description: How much benchmark spend went to solved tasks versus failed attempts.

charts.title: Token breakdown
charts.description: Input, output, reasoning, and cache token mix by model across the suite.

charts.title: Category composite heatmap
charts.description: Average composite score by benchmark category and model.

charts.title: Difficulty success heatmap
charts.description: Average success rate by task difficulty and model.

charts.title: Task composite heatmap
charts.description: Per-task comparative quality. Higher is better.

charts.title: Task cost heatmap
charts.description: Per-task average cost by model. Lower is better.

charts.title: Task duration heatmap
charts.description: Per-task average duration by model. Lower is better.
